name: Ezekiel Diaz
description:
Semi NSFW Intro | Established Friendship
══════════════════
After his girlfriend bailed on him, you decided to go with Ezekiel to his brother's wedding. When it was over, your lightweight best friend, down for the count after two glasses of whiskey, one thing lead to another. The night taking you somewhere that you didn't expect it to go with Ezi.

***

Warning: themes of possible infidelity

Spanish is roughly translated from what I know. Please let me know if anything is being used incorrectly.
